name: Smart Sunset Lamp
description: A warm amber projection that turns any wall into a living sunset. Remote controlled. USB powered. No app, no complexity — just light that makes a room feel like it exhales.

name: Quiet Desk Fan
description: Three functions in one quiet body — fan, humidifier, ambient light. Multiple speeds, a water tank for cool mist, and a presence so subtle you only notice when it’s off.

name: 75% Mechanical Keyboard
description: Gasket-mounted. Pre-lubed linear switches tuned for a deep, satisfying thock. Hot-swappable. PBT keycaps. Wireless or wired. A rotary knob and TFT screen because even your tools should have presence.

name: Oversized Felt Desk Mat
description: Premium wool felt stretched across your entire workspace. Non-slip rubber base. Heat resistant. Dark grey. 900 by 400 millimeters of intentional surface that makes everything on top of it feel more deliberate.

name: Wood Grain Aroma Diffuser
description: Dark wood grain. 300ml capacity. Ultrasonic mist that carries whatever scent defines your focus. Remote controlled. A warm ambient glow that turns vapor into atmosphere.

name: USB Mug Warmer
description: Black body. Black cable. Silent ceramic heating plate that keeps your cup at the right temperature for as long as you need it. USB powered. No switches, no lights, no noise. Just warmth.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: Aluminum body. Clips to your monitor. Casts asymmetric light downward onto your desk without touching the screen. Five color temperatures from warm amber to cool white. Touch controlled. The light your setup deserves.
